channel.title: Zsh on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Zsh on Arrans github.io

item.title: starship/starship
item.description: ☄🌌️ The minimal, blazing-fast, and infinitely customizable prompt for any shell!

item.title: warpdotdev/Warp
item.description: Warp is a modern, Rust-based terminal with AI built in so you and your team can build great software, faster.

item.title: alebcay/awesome-shell
item.description: A curated list of awesome command-line frameworks, toolkits, guides and gizmos. Inspired by awesome-php.

item.title: ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh
item.description: 🙃 A delightful community-driven (with 2,300+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool so that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.

item.title: asdf-vm/asdf
item.description: Extendable version manager with support for Ruby, Node.js, Elixir, Erlang & more
